actionCalls.description: Calls the AgentObjectDescribe Apex action to return the complete field-level schema for the specified Salesforce object.
actionCalls.name: Describe_Object
actionCalls.label: Describe Object Schema

Flow.interviewLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: Describe Object Schema {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: WSM - ALF - Agent: Describe Object Schema

variables.description: The API name of the Salesforce object to describe. Use the exact API name including the __c suffix for custom objects. Examples: Account, Contact, Opportunity, Case, My_Custom_Object__c.
variables.name: objectApiName

variables.description: When true, includes the active picklist values for each picklist and multi-select picklist field. Defaults to false to reduce response size. Set to true when you need to know valid values before creating or updating a record.
variables.name: includePicklistValues

variables.description: When true, includes parent lookup and master-detail relationship target objects, relationship names, and child relationship details. Defaults to false. Set to true when you need to understand how objects are connected to each other.
variables.name: includeRelationships

variables.description: JSON object describing the object schema. Contains objectLabel, objectApiName, isCustom, isCreateable, fieldCount, and a fields array. Each field includes apiName, label, type, required, createable, updateable, and length. Optionally includes picklistValues and relationship details.
variables.name: schemaJson

variables.description: Total number of fields on the object that are accessible to the current user.
variables.name: fieldCount

variables.description: True if the object was found and described successfully, false if there was an error. Always check this before using the schema JSON. When false, read errorMessage for details.
variables.name: success

variables.description: Description of the error when success is false. Common errors include: object does not exist, object is not accessible to the current user. Empty when success is true.
variables.name: errorMessage
